div.class: o_action h-100 d-flex flex-column bg-100 p-3
d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3 bg-white p-2 rounded shadow-sm

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-info fw-bold shadow-sm text-dark

div.class: card p-3 mb-3 shadow-sm border-0 d-flex flex-row gap-3 align-items-center bg-white

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-warning text-dark fw-bold shadow-sm
button.title: Launch Smart View

div.class: d-flex flex-column gap-1 pe-3 border-start ps-3
div.label: Target Date

div.class: d-flex align-items-center gap-4 ms-2 border-start ps-3
card flex-grow-1 p-0 shadow-sm border-0 bg-white

th.style: min-width: 200px; width: 200px; position: sticky; left: 0; z-index: 11; background-color: #f1f3f5;
th.class: fw-bolder align-middle border-end text-start ps-3 text-secondary text-uppercase shadow-sm

span.class: badge bg-warning text-dark border border-warning ms-2

i.class: fa fa-cog text-muted cursor-pointer hover-text-primary transition-all bg-white rounded-circle shadow-sm
i.title: Therapist Quick Actions

td.style: cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; min-height: 75px; vertical-align: top;

div.class: fw-bold text-dark mb-1 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center

span.class: badge bg-danger text-white px-2 py-1 shadow-sm
badge bg-warning text-dark px-2 py-1 shadow-sm border border-warning
badge bg-white text-dark px-2 py-1 border border-secondary shadow-sm

div.class: w-100 h-100 d-flex flex-column align-items-center justify-content-center opacity-75

span.class: badge bg-secondary text-uppercase py-1 px-2 shadow-sm

div.class: w-100 h-100 d-flex flex-column align-items-center justify-content-center opacity-50 hover-opacity-100 text-success
card h-100 border-0 shadow-sm rounded-lg bg-white overflow-hidden

h6.class: text-uppercase text-primary font-weight-bold mb-2 pb-1 border-bottom

span.class: badge bg-light text-dark border p-2 d-flex align-items-center rounded shadow-sm

h6.class: text-uppercase text-warning font-weight-bold mb-2 pb-1 border-bottom

t.span: No floaters checking in to this location.

span.class: badge bg-warning-subtle text-warning-darker border p-2 d-flex align-items-center rounded shadow-sm

div.class: card p-3 shadow-sm border-0 bg-white d-flex flex-column h-100
d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4 border-bottom pb-3

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-light border text-primary fw-bold shadow-sm

div.class: p-4 border-start border-4 border-primary bg-white shadow-inner
border rounded px-3 py-2 bg-light shadow-sm d-flex flex-column
d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-2 pb-1 border-bottom

i.class: fa fa-spinner fa-spin fa-3x text-primary mb-3

div.class: card h-100 border-0 shadow-sm rounded bg-white text-center p-3 cursor-pointer
card h-100 border-0 shadow-sm rounded bg-white text-center p-3 cursor-pointer

div.t-attf-class: card h-100 border-0 shadow-sm rounded text-center p-3 cursor-pointer #{state.analyticsData.kpis.unallotted_patients > 0 ? 'bg-danger-subtle border-danger' : 'bg-white'}

div.class: alert alert-info p-2 mb-2 text-start shadow-sm border-info

t.div: Test Mode: Click below to fire the payload. Then click Full Edit to read the generated message in the log.

button.class: btn btn-info w-100 fw-bold py-2 mb-3 text-white shadow-sm border border-info
btn btn-warning fw-bold py-2 mt-2 text-dark shadow-sm

t.p: All active therapists in your master directory have already been allotted to this branch.

input.placeholder: Search by Name, Badge ID, or Vendor ID...

button.t-attf-class: list-group-item list-group-item-action d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center #{state.selectedTherapistObj and state.selectedTherapistObj.id === t.id ? 'active bg-primary border-primary' : ''}

span.class: badge bg-warning text-dark border border-warning shadow-sm

div.class: alert alert-warning border-0 bg-warning-subtle mt-3 p-3 d-flex align-items-center shadow-sm rounded
div.p:
Transit Warning Triggered! This therapist is already scheduled at
today.

button.class: btn btn-info fw-bold text-dark px-4 shadow-sm

i.class: fa fa-folder-open-o fs-1 text-muted opacity-50 mb-3 d-block

div.h6: No records found for this metric.

div.p: Manage this therapist's matrix settings or daily attendance.

button.t-attf-class: btn fw-bold py-2 shadow-sm w-100 mb-3 #{t_obj and t_obj.is_buffer ? 'btn-outline-warning text-dark' : 'btn-warning text-dark'}

button.class: btn btn-success fw-bold py-2 shadow-sm w-100 mb-3
btn btn-outline-warning text-dark fw-bold py-2 shadow-sm

div.class: alert alert-warning p-2 small text-start mb-0

div.div: Slots before this time will be unassigned and blocked.

div.class: card border-0 shadow-sm text-center p-3 h-100 bg-white
card border-0 shadow-sm text-center p-3 h-100 bg-white
card border-0 shadow-sm text-center p-3 h-100 bg-info-subtle border border-info-subtle
card border-0 shadow-sm text-center p-3 h-100 bg-warning-subtle border border-warning-subtle
d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center bg-white p-3 rounded shadow-sm mb-4 border-start border-4 border-primary
alert alert-secondary border-0 text-center py-4 shadow-sm

t.div: All available staff are currently engaged or booked.
